label: Variant Of
description: If item is a variant of another item then description, image, pricing, taxes etc will be set from the template unless explicitly specified

label: Default Material Request Type
options:
Purchase
Material Transfer
Material Issue
Manufacture
Customer Provided

label: Weight Per Unit
description: Item Weight

label: Weight UOM
description: Item Weight UOM

label: Barcode
description: Barcode for the item (ie: EAN-13).

label: Pack Barcode
description: The barcode for the identification of distribution boxes or pallets containing products (ie: EAN-14).

label: Item Height
description: Height of item in cm.

label: Item Width
description: Width of item in cm.

label: Item Depth
description: Depth of item in cm.

label: Pack Count
description: Quantity of item pieces contained in the pack.

label: Pack Height
description: Height of pack in cm.

label: Pack Width
description: Width of pack in cm.

label: Pack Depth
description: Depth of pack in cm.

label: Pack Weight
description: in kg

label: Pallet packs per layer
description: Quantity of packs per layer on pallet.

label: Pallet layers
description: Quantity of layers on pallet.

label: Packs per pallet
description: Quantity of packs on pallet.

label: Pallet weight
description: Weight of pallet in weight UOM.

label: Pallet height
description: Height of pallet in cm.

label: Pallet width
description: Width of pallet in cm.

label: Pallet depth
description: Depth of pallet in cm.
Parámetro de porcentaje para análisis de diferencias en Stock Entries. Default a 3%

label: Porcentaje de Diferencia permitida en Stock Entries
description: Parámetro de porcentaje para análisis de diferencias en Stock Entries

label: Reorder level based on Warehouse
description: Will also apply for variants unless overrridden

label: UOMs
description: Will also apply for variants

label: Batch Number Series
description: Example: ABCD.#####. If series is set and Batch No is not mentioned in transactions, then automatic batch number will be created based on this series. If you always want to explicitly mention Batch No for this item, leave this blank. Note: this setting will take priority over the Naming Series Prefix in Stock Settings.

label: Max Sample Quantity
description: Maximum sample quantity that can be retained

label: Serial Number Series
description:
Example: ABCD.#####
If series is set and Serial No is not mentioned in transactions, then automatic serial number will be created based on this series. If you always want to explicitly mention Serial Nos for this item. leave this blank.

label: Has Variants
description: If this item has variants, then it cannot be selected in sales orders etc.

label: Minimum Order Qty
description: Minimum quantity should be as per Stock UOM

label: Lead Time in days
description: Average time taken by the supplier to deliver

label: Reading required
description: If the item requires Gas or Electricity or similar meter reading to charge the customer.

label: Taxes
description: Will also apply for variants

label: Supply Raw Materials for Purchase
description: If subcontracted to a vendor

label: Contenido energetico kcal
description: Por porción.

label: Contenido energetico kJ
description: Por porción.

label: Contenido energetico por envase kcal
description: Por envase.

label: Contenido energetico por envase kJ
description: Por envase.

label: Contenido neto
description: Indica el contenido neto con los decimales y unidades de medida adecuados para la etiqueta.

label: Exceso Energia
description: ≥ 70 kcal totales o ≥ 8 kcal de azúcares libres

label: Exceso Azucares
description:
≥ 10 % del total de energía proveniente e
azúcares libres.

label: Exceso Grasas Saturadas
description:
≥ 1 % del total de energía proveniente
de grasas trans.

label: Exceso Sodio
description: ≥ 1 mg de sodio por kcal o ≥ 300 mg

label: Publish in Hub
description: Publish Item to hub.erpnext.com

label: Hub Warehouse
description: Publish "In Stock" or "Not in Stock" on Hub based on stock available in this warehouse.

label: Tasa de Impuesto
description: Utilice numeros enteros. Ej. 16 para una tasa del 16%. 8 para tasa de 8%.

label: UPC
description: Código numérico único que identifica al producto (sin ceros ni dígito verificador) ejemplo: 73502931190

label: Descripción comercial del producto
description: Indicar las características detalladas del producto
